description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a dark wood finish, featuring a spacious tabletop suitable for writing or computer work. On one side, it has a set of three vertically stacked drawers with a lighter, slightly distressed appearance, providing storage for office supplies or documents. The desk is supported by two slender legs on the opposite end, giving it a modern, minimalist look. The side panels and drawer unit are constructed from the same wood material, with visible grain patterns adding texture. The overall design is functional and contemporary, making it suitable for both professional and home office environments. The surface appears smooth and hard, with a matte finish that resists glare.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a dark wood finish, featuring three light-colored drawers on one side and slender legs on the other. The design is minimalist and functional, with a smooth, matte surface.
description_view_0: The desk is viewed from the narrow end, showing the depth of the tabletop and the two supporting legs.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the desk, displaying the three light-colored drawers and the full length of the tabletop.
description_view_2: The desk is seen from the side opposite the drawers, showing the solid wood panel and the depth of the desk.
description_view_3: A side view of the desk, emphasizing the solid panel and the open leg space beneath the tabletop.
attribute_orientation: The side with the three drawers is intended to face the user, providing easy access to storage, while the open leg space allows for comfortable seating.
